---
title: "Shop"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* ── Shop Variables ── */
  :root {
    --wood-dark:    #2c1a0e;
    --wood-mid:     #6b3a1f;
    --wood-warm:    #c47c3a;
    --wood-light:   #e8c99a;
    --cream:        #faf6f0;
    --text-dark:    #1a1008;
    --text-mid:     #4a2e14;
    --text-light:   #8a6a4a;
    --green-accent: #3d6b4f;
    --shadow:       0 4px 24px rgba(44,26,14,0.13);
    --radius:       12px;
  }

  /* ── Layout ── */
  .shop-header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  .shop-header p {
    color: var(--text-light);
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    max-width: 540px;
    margin: 0.4rem auto 0;
  }

  /* ── Controls ── */
  .shop-controls {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    padding-bottom: 1.2rem;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--wood-light);
  }
  .filter-btns {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .filter-btn {
    padding: 0.45rem 1.1rem;
    border: 2px solid var(--wood-mid);
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--wood-mid);
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  }
  .filter-btn:hover,
  .filter-btn.active {
    background: var(--wood-mid);
    color: #fff;
  }
  .sort-select {
    padding: 0.45rem 1rem;
    border: 2px solid var(--wood-mid);
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--wood-mid);
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    outline: none;
  }

  /* ── Product Grid ── */
  .product-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.8rem;
  }

  /* ── Product Card ── */
  .product-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    transition: transform 0.22s, box-shadow 0.22s;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .product-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-5px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 36px rgba(44,26,14,0.18);
  }
  .card-img-wrap {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--cream);
  }
  .card-img-wrap img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.4s;
  }
  .product-card:hover .card-img-wrap img {
    transform: scale(1.04);
  }
  .card-body {
    padding: 1.1rem 1.2rem 1.3rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex: 1;
  }
  .card-category {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--wood-warm);
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  .card-name {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--wood-dark);
    margin: 0 0 0.3rem;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .card-dims {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--text-light);
    margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
  }
  .card-footer {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-top: auto;
  }
  .card-price {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--green-accent);
  }
  .btn-quickview {
    padding: 0.45rem 1rem;
    background: var(--wood-mid);
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  }
  .btn-quickview:hover {
    background: var(--wood-dark);
  }
  .sold-out-badge {
    padding: 0.45rem 1rem;
    background: #e0d6cc;
    color: #999;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  /* ── Cart Badge in Navbar ── */
  #cart-nav-btn {
    position: fixed;
    top: 1rem;
    right: 1.2rem;
    z-index: 1100;
    background: var(--wood-mid);
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.1rem;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(44,26,14,0.2);
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  #cart-nav-btn:hover { background: var(--wood-dark); }
  #cart-count {
    background: var(--wood-warm);
    color: #fff;
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 0.1rem 0.55rem;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    min-width: 22px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  /* ── Quick-View Modal ── */
  .modal-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(30,15,5,0.55);
    z-index: 2000;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 1rem;
  }
  .modal-overlay.open {
    display: flex;
  }
  .modal-box {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 16px;
    max-width: 640px;
    width: 100%;
    max-height: 90vh;
    overflow-y: auto;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(44,26,14,0.3);
    animation: modalIn 0.25s ease;
  }
  @keyframes modalIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px) scale(0.97); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
  }
  .modal-img {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 16px 16px 0 0;
  }
  .modal-body {
    padding: 1.5rem 1.8rem 2rem;
  }
  .modal-category {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--wood-warm);
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  .modal-name {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--wood-dark);
    margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  }
  .modal-price {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--green-accent);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .modal-desc {
    color: var(--text-mid);
    font-size: 0.97rem;
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  }
  .modal-dims {
    background: var(--cream);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
    display: flex;
    gap: 1.5rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    color: var(--text-mid);
  }
  .modal-dims span { font-weight: 700; color: var(--wood-dark); }
  .modal-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.8rem;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .btn-add-cart {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
    background: var(--green-accent);
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-add-cart:hover { background: #2d5039; }
  .btn-close-modal {
    padding: 0.75rem 1.2rem;
    background: transparent;
    border: 2px solid var(--wood-light);
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-light);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-close-modal:hover {
    border-color: var(--wood-mid);
    color: var(--wood-mid);
  }

  /* ── Cart Drawer ── */
  .cart-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(30,15,5,0.45);
    z-index: 3000;
  }
  .cart-overlay.open { display: block; }
  .cart-drawer {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; right: 0;
    width: min(400px, 100vw);
    height: 100vh;
    background: #fff;
    z-index: 3001;
    box-shadow: -8px 0 40px rgba(44,26,14,0.18);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    transform: translateX(100%);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  }
  .cart-overlay.open .cart-drawer {
    transform: translateX(0);
  }
  .cart-drawer-header {
    padding: 1.3rem 1.5rem;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--wood-light);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .cart-drawer-header h3 {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    color: var(--wood-dark);
  }
  .btn-close-cart {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .cart-items {
    flex: 1;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
  }
  .cart-item {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0.9rem 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--wood-light);
  }
  .cart-item img {
    width: 64px;
    height: 64px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 8px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .cart-item-info { flex: 1; }
  .cart-item-name {
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--wood-dark);
    margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
  }
  .cart-item-price {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--green-accent);
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .btn-remove-item {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    color: #ccc;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 0.2rem;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-remove-item:hover { color: #e05; }
  .cart-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: var(--text-light);
    padding: 3rem 1rem;
    font-size: 0.97rem;
  }
  .cart-footer {
    padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem;
    border-top: 2px solid var(--wood-light);
  }
  .cart-total {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--wood-dark);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .btn-checkout {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.85rem;
    background: var(--green-accent);
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-checkout:hover { background: #2d5039; }
  .btn-checkout:disabled {
    background: #ccc;
    cursor: not-allowed;
  }

  /* ── Loading / Empty States ── */
  .shop-loading {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 4rem 1rem;
    color: var(--text-light);
    font-size: 1rem;
  }
  .shop-empty {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 3rem 1rem;
    color: var(--text-light);
  }

  /* ── Toast ── */
  .toast {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 2rem;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(80px);
    background: var(--wood-dark);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 0.7rem 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    z-index: 9999;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .toast.show {
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);
  }
</style>

<!-- Cart Nav Button -->
<button id="cart-nav-btn" onclick="openCart()">
  🛒 Cart <span id="cart-count">0</span>
</button>

<!-- Shop Header -->
<div class="shop-header">
  <p>Each piece is handcrafted in small batches from sustainably sourced hardwoods. Once it's gone, it's gone.</p>
</div>

<!-- Controls -->
<div class="shop-controls">
  <div class="filter-btns">
    <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="setFilter('all', this)">All</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setFilter('charcuterie', this)">Charcuterie Boards</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setFilter('cutting-board', this)">Cutting Boards</button>
  </div>
  <select class="sort-select" onchange="setSort(this.value)">
    <option value="default">Sort: Featured</option>
    <option value="price-asc">Price: Low to High</option>
    <option value="price-desc">Price: High to Low</option>
  </select>
</div>

<!-- Product Grid -->
<div id="product-grid" class="product-grid">
  <div class="shop-loading">Loading products…</div>
</div>

<!-- Quick-View Modal -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="modal-overlay" onclick="handleOverlayClick(event)">
  <div class="modal-box" id="modal-box">
    <img id="modal-img" class="modal-img" src="" alt="">
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="modal-category" id="modal-category"></div>
      <div class="modal-name" id="modal-name"></div>
      <div class="modal-price" id="modal-price"></div>
      <div class="modal-desc" id="modal-desc"></div>
      <div class="modal-dims" id="modal-dims"></div>
      <div class="modal-actions">
        <button class="btn-add-cart" id="modal-add-btn" onclick="addToCartFromModal()">Add to Cart</button>
        <button class="btn-close-modal" onclick="closeModal()">Close</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Cart Drawer -->
<div class="cart-overlay" id="cart-overlay" onclick="handleCartOverlayClick(event)">
  <div class="cart-drawer" id="cart-drawer">
    <div class="cart-drawer-header">
      <h3>Your Cart</h3>
      <button class="btn-close-cart" onclick="closeCart()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="cart-items" id="cart-items"></div>
    <div class="cart-footer">
      <div class="cart-total">
        <span>Total</span>
        <span id="cart-total">$0.00</span>
      </div>
      <button class="btn-checkout" id="btn-checkout" onclick="checkout()" disabled>
        Proceed to Checkout
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Toast -->
<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
  const SUPABASE_URL  = 'https://ajfrywnzlflihaxeyvoa.supabase.co';
  const SUPABASE_ANON = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImFqZnJ5d256bGZsaWhheGV5dm9hIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc5MzY0MjQsImV4cCI6MjA5MzUxMjQyNH0.b1DKxunkP3DARBhwbXZbKMcNYWI0Rr3ETSbUC2nK3PI';

  let allProducts   = [];
  let activeFilter  = 'all';
  let activeSort    = 'default';
  let currentProduct = null;

  // ── Fetch Products ──────────────────────────────────────────
  async function loadProducts() {
    const now = new Date().toISOString();
    const url = `${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/products?select=*&active=eq.true&stock=gt.0&or=(reserved_until.is.null,reserved_until.lt.${now})&order=created_at.asc`;
    const res = await fetch(url, {
      headers: {
        'apikey': SUPABASE_ANON,
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${SUPABASE_ANON}`
      }
    });
    allProducts = await res.json();
    renderGrid();
  }

  // ── Render Grid ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  function renderGrid() {
    let products = [...allProducts];

    // Filter
    if (activeFilter !== 'all') {
      products = products.filter(p => p.category === activeFilter);
    }

    // Sort
    if (activeSort === 'price-asc')  products.sort((a,b) => a.price - b.price);
    if (activeSort === 'price-desc') products.sort((a,b) => b.price - a.price);

    const grid = document.getElementById('product-grid');

    if (products.length === 0) {
      grid.innerHTML = '<div class="shop-empty">No products found.</div>';
      return;
    }

    grid.innerHTML = products.map(p => {
      const img     = p.images?.[0] ?? '';
      const inCart  = cartContains(p.id);
      const dims    = `${p.length_in}" × ${p.width_in}" × ${p.thickness_in}"`;
      const catLabel = p.category === 'charcuterie' ? 'Charcuterie Board' : 'Cutting Board';
      return `
        <div class="product-card" onclick="openModal('${p.id}')">
          <div class="card-img-wrap">
            <img src="${img}" alt="${p.name}" loading="lazy">
          </div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-category">${catLabel}</div>
            <div class="card-name">${p.name}</div>
            <div class="card-dims">${dims}</div>
            <div class="card-footer">
              <div class="card-price">$${Number(p.price).toFixed(2)}</div>
              ${inCart
                ? `<div class="sold-out-badge">In Cart</div>`
                : `<button class="btn-quickview" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); openModal('${p.id}')">Quick View</button>`
              }
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>`;
    }).join('');
  }

  // ── Filters & Sort ───────────────────────────────────────────
  function setFilter(val, btn) {
    activeFilter = val;
    document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    renderGrid();
  }
  function setSort(val) {
    activeSort = val;
    renderGrid();
  }

  // ── Modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function openModal(id) {
    const p = allProducts.find(x => x.id === id);
    if (!p) return;
    currentProduct = p;
    const catLabel = p.category === 'charcuterie' ? 'Charcuterie Board' : 'Cutting Board';
    document.getElementById('modal-img').src        = p.images?.[0] ?? '';
    document.getElementById('modal-img').alt        = p.name;
    document.getElementById('modal-category').textContent = catLabel;
    document.getElementById('modal-name').textContent     = p.name;
    document.getElementById('modal-price').textContent    = `$${Number(p.price).toFixed(2)}`;
    document.getElementById('modal-desc').textContent     = p.description;
    document.getElementById('modal-dims').innerHTML =
      `<div>Length <span>${p.length_in}"</span></div>
       <div>Width <span>${p.width_in}"</span></div>
       <div>Thickness <span>${p.thickness_in}"</span></div>`;
    const inCart = cartContains(p.id);
    const btn = document.getElementById('modal-add-btn');
    btn.textContent = inCart ? 'Already in Cart' : 'Add to Cart';
    btn.disabled    = inCart;
    document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }
  function closeModal() {
    document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
    currentProduct = null;
  }
  function handleOverlayClick(e) {
    if (e.target === document.getElementById('modal-overlay')) closeModal();
  }

  // ── Cart ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function getCart() {
    return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('mww_cart') || '[]');
  }
  function saveCart(cart) {
    localStorage.setItem('mww_cart', JSON.stringify(cart));
    updateCartUI();
    renderGrid();
  }
  function cartContains(id) {
    return getCart().some(i => i.id === id);
  }
  function addToCartFromModal() {
    if (!currentProduct) return;
    const cart = getCart();
    if (cartContains(currentProduct.id)) return;
    cart.push({
      id:             currentProduct.id,
      slug:           currentProduct.slug,
      name:           currentProduct.name,
      price:          currentProduct.price,
      stripe_price_id: currentProduct.stripe_price_id,
      image:          currentProduct.images?.[0] ?? ''
    });
    saveCart(cart);
    closeModal();
    showToast(`"${currentProduct.name}" added to cart`);
  }
  function removeFromCart(id) {
    saveCart(getCart().filter(i => i.id !== id));
  }
  function updateCartUI() {
    const cart  = getCart();
    const count = cart.length;
    document.getElementById('cart-count').textContent = count;
    const total = cart.reduce((s, i) => s + Number(i.price), 0);
    document.getElementById('cart-total').textContent = `$${total.toFixed(2)}`;
    const itemsEl = document.getElementById('cart-items');
    if (count === 0) {
      itemsEl.innerHTML = '<div class="cart-empty">Your cart is empty.</div>';
      document.getElementById('btn-checkout').disabled = true;
    } else {
      itemsEl.innerHTML = cart.map(i => `
        <div class="cart-item">
          <img src="${i.image}" alt="${i.name}">
          <div class="cart-item-info">
            <div class="cart-item-name">${i.name}</div>
            <div class="cart-item-price">$${Number(i.price).toFixed(2)}</div>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-remove-item" onclick="removeFromCart('${i.id}')" title="Remove">✕</button>
        </div>`).join('');
      document.getElementById('btn-checkout').disabled = false;
    }
  }

  // ── Cart Drawer ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  function openCart() {
    document.getElementById('cart-overlay').classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }
  function closeCart() {
    document.getElementById('cart-overlay').classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }
  function handleCartOverlayClick(e) {
    if (e.target === document.getElementById('cart-overlay')) closeCart();
  }

  // ── Checkout ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  async function checkout() {
    const cart = getCart();
    if (cart.length === 0) return;
    const btn = document.getElementById('btn-checkout');
    btn.textContent = 'Redirecting…';
    btn.disabled = true;
    try {
      const res = await fetch('/.netlify/functions/create-checkout', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ items: cart })
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.url) {
        window.location.href = data.url;
      } else {
        showToast('Checkout failed — please try again.');
        btn.textContent = 'Proceed to Checkout';
        btn.disabled = false;
      }
    } catch (err) {
      showToast('Something went wrong — please try again.');
      btn.textContent = 'Proceed to Checkout';
      btn.disabled = false;
    }
  }

  // ── Toast ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function showToast(msg) {
    const t = document.getElementById('toast');
    t.textContent = msg;
    t.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 2800);
  }

  // ── Init ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  updateCartUI();
  loadProducts();
</script>
```
